creator: leeym@leeym.com
text:
On Sun, Sep 09, 2001 at 05:57:55PM -0700, Bill Fenner wrote:
> Did anyone ask the original author if he wanted MAINTAINERship?
> The port survey sent him a reminder because of an unfetchable
> distfile and he sent me email because he didn't know where else to
> submit changes.
> 
>   Bill
> 

I asked him three weeks ago, and he told me that he would be happy to be the
MAINTAINER, so I transfer the MAINTAINERship to him.

== begin quoted
On Mon, Aug 20, 2001 at 02:51:10PM +0800, Yen-Ming Lee wrote:
> I don't know that the MASTER_SITES of tmetric was moved, and I found
> that tmetric on netgraft.com (original MASTER_SITE) is v0.99, so I upgraded
> tmetric port from v0.4 to 0.99. It seems that I made a mistake.

That was my fault.  I really hadn't know that tmetric was included
with FreeBSD until I stumbled across it one day while doing a locate.

> I'll send PR later to correct these related files.
>
> BTW, would you like to be the maintainer of FreeBSD tmetric port yourself?
> If yes, I can modify the MAINTAINER section in Makefile as well.

I'd be happy to.

Thanks!

--
Michael Bacarella <mbac@nyct.net>
Technical Staff / System Development,
New York Connect.Net, Ltd.
== end quoted
